seoTitle: Karalundi vs Kardinya — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Karalundi and Kardinya. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Karalundi and Kardinya.
heading: Karalundi vs Kardinya — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Karalundi, Western Australia and Kardinya, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Karalundi has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Kardinya (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Karalundi or Kardinya safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Karalundi has a flood risk score of 58/100, while Kardinya scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Karalundi scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Kardinya scores 44/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Karalundi or Kardinya?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Karalundi has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.33% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
